name: reva-speaks
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman with silver-streaked dark hair, Sovereignty uniform. Speaking with precision, no preamble. Expression controlled, testing. Cool blue-white light from above. Background abstract dark tones. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: The Sovereignty doesn't recruit by origin. It recruits by conviction.

name: reva-continues
prompt: Medium close-up. Older woman continuing to speak, eyes steady on her subject. Silver-streaked hair, sharp features, Commandant insignia visible. Expression measuring. Cool blue lighting from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: Everyone on this transport chose to forget — which means everyone has something they're leaving behind.

name: the-blade
prompt: Close-up, tight framing. Older woman's face, delivering the question. Eyes sharp, clinical precision. The question is a scalpel. Cool blue light from the left, shadows on right side of face. Background dark, vignette closing in — pressure visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

sfx.description: heavy silence settling, emotional weight in the air

name: the-wound
prompt: Close-up on young brunette woman's face. The question landing — clean, surgical, testing the wound. Eyes widening slightly, composure cracking at the edges. Expression raw, caught off-guard. Cool blue light from viewport side, face partially in shadow. Heavy emotional weight visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
